Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class InsertRecordsFromPayloadResponse

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.InsertRecordsFromPayloadResponse
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.apache.avro.generic.GenericContainer, org.apache.avro.generic.IndexedRecord
public class InsertRecordsFromPayloadResponse extends Object implements org.apache.avro.generic.IndexedRecord
A set of results returned by GPUdb.insertRecordsFromPayload.
